title: NTA GAT‑B and BET Admit Card 2026

detail.title: NTA GAT‑B and BET Admit Card 2026
detail.short_info: The Admit Card for GAT-B and BET has been released by NTA. Students who are yet to appear for the examination can download their hall tickets from the official website nta.ac.in.

sections.heading: NTA GAT‑B and BET Admit Card 2026

content.text: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has released the GAT‑B and BET Admit Card 2026 for candidates appearing in the Graduate Aptitude Test‑Biotechnology (GAT‑B) and Biotechnology Eligibility Test (BET). Candidates who successfully applied can now download their hall tickets in online mode only; no hard copy will be sent by post or email.

The admit card carries details such as candidate name, roll number, exam date, shift time, reporting time, exam centre and exam‑day guidelines. Candidates must verify all details printed on the admit card and carry a printed copy along with a valid photo ID to the allotted exam centre.
Download Here: NTA GAT‑B and BET Admit Card 2026

links.text: NTA GAT‑B and BET Admit Card 2026

rows: Graduate Aptitude Test – Biotechnology (GAT‑B) 2026 and Biotechnology Eligibility Test (BET) 2026
National Testing Agency (NTA) on behalf of DBT
17 May 2026 (both GAT‑B and BET on Sunday)
Computer‑Based Test (CBT) conducted across 54 cities in India
Application number and password or date of birth, plus security pin/captcha
Printed GAT‑B/BET admit card and valid photo ID (Aadhaar/PAN/Passport/Voter ID/Driving Licence, etc.)

sections.heading: How to Download NTA GAT‑B/BET Admit Card 2026

items: Visit the official NTA exam portal (for GAT‑B/BET 2026).
Click on the “GAT‑B/BET 2026 Admit Card” or “Download Hall Ticket” link on the homepage.
Log in using your Application Number and Date of Birth (and security pin, if asked).
Click on “Submit / Login” to view the admit card.
Check all details and then download and print 2–3 clear A4‑size copies of the admit card.

content.text: If the photograph or signature on the admit card is unclear, candidates should carry additional passport‑size photographs (same as used in the application form) to the exam centre.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned on GAT‑B/BET Admit Card 2026

items: Candidate’s name, photograph and signature
Application number and roll number
Exam name: GAT‑B 2026 / BET 2026
Exam date and shift timing
Reporting time and gate‑closing time
Exam centre name, code and full address
Exam‑day instructions and items permitted/prohibited in the exam hall

content.text: Any discrepancy in the candidate’s particulars or exam details must be reported immediately to NTA through the official helpline before the exam date.

sections.heading: Documents Required with NTA GAT‑B and BET Admit Card 2026

content.text: On the examination day, candidates must carry:

items: A printed copy of the GAT‑B/BET Admit Card 2026 (clear A4‑size printout).
One original valid photo ID proof: Aadhaar Card / PAN Card / Passport / Voter ID / Driving Licence or any other government‑issued ID as specified in the information bulletin.
Additional documents if applicable (PwD certificate and scribe permission letter for candidates availing such facility).

content.text: Entry into the exam centre will not be permitted without the printed admit card and valid photo ID.

seo_tags: NTA GAT‑B and BET Admit Card 2026
